| Suggested allocation | 3,230 SEK |
| Max risk at stop | ~158 SEK (1.6% of capital) |
| Risk mode | normal |
| **Valid until** | **2026-04-21** (2 trading days) |

**Score breakdown**: Momentum 1M=100 · 3M=100 · 6M=98 · RSI=74 (score=64) · Trend=88 · Volume=52 · Sharpe(1Y)=+0.97 · MaxDD=42.9%

**Thesis**: Strong 3M momentum; elevated valuation (P/FCF 45×)
**Suggested hold**: 8 weeks

**Valuation**: P/E(ttm)=61.2 · P/E(fwd)=29.3 · EV/EBITDA=33.0 · P/FCF=44.9 · PEG=1.8 · Analyst target=61.25 SEK · Upside=-9%
Fundamentals: Rev +9% YoY | ROIC 10% | ND/EBITDA 2.0× | Cash conv 1.36 | Gross margin 35% | Op margin 9%
**Short interest**: — · ratio —
**FCF Screen** (4yr): Margin=7.5% (target ≥8%) ✗ · Trend=✗ · Cycle-resilient=✓ · → FCF concerns — check manually

> **Note**: stop distance is sized from the recommendation close (67.30 SEK). If filled outside the buy range, recalculate stop as: `fill_price × (1 − 1.5 × 4.1% ATR)` = 64.21 SEK at buy-range upper.
